description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in JetPhoto allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the page parameter in (1) Classic.view/thumbnail.php, (2) Classic.view/gallery.php, (3) Classic.view/detail.php, or (4) Orange.view/detail.php; or (5) the name parameter in Orange.view/slideshow.php.
